strow.stentry: 1. It specifies the path of data file. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is current path.
1. It specifies the path of index file 2. If it is not specified, the default path is the same with 'dbpath'.

1. Specified configuration file path (doesn't contain fiel name). The system will find under confpath. 2. contains necessary configuration items. The format of a configuration item is "parameter name=value" like "svcname=11810" and "diaglevel=3". 3. If this parameter is not specified, system will automatically search for sdb.conf in current path. 4. There may not be sdb.conf.

1. Synchronous log files will be created when replication node does full sync. This parameter is used to specified the path of synchronous log file. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is "Data file path/replicalog".
1. It specifies the catalog of diagnostic log. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is "Data file path/diaglog".
1. It specifies the catalog of audit log. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is "Data file path/diaglog".
1. It specifies the number of diagnostic log file. 2. If it is not specified, the default 20; -1 means unlimited.
1. It specifies the number of audit log file. 2. If it is not specified, the default 20; -1 means unlimited.
1. It specifies the catalog of backup file. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is "Data file path/bakfile".
1. It specifies the amount of thread in thread pool. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is 20, value range is [0,10000].
1. It specifies local service port. 2. If it is not specified, the default value are 11810 for coord, 11800 for catalog, 11820 for datanode.
1. It specifies data synch port. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "svcname+1".
1. It specifies shard port. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "svcname+2".
1. It specifies catalog port. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "svcname+3".
1. It specifies http port. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "svcname+4".

1. It specifies the print level of diagnostic log. Diagnostic log in sequoiaDB, 0-5 respectively represent: SEVERE, ERROR, EVENT,WARNING, INFO, DEBUG. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "WARNING".

1. It specifies the mask of audit log. Audit type in sequoiaDB as follow: ACCESS,CLUSTER,SYSTEM,DML,DDL,DCL,DQL,INSERT,DELETE,UPDATE,OTHER. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "SYSTEM|DDL|DCL". ALL enable all mask, NONE disable all mask

1. It specifies serving role. In sequoiaDB, "data/coord/catalog/standalone" represents "data node/coord node/catalog node/stand-alone machine". 2. If it is not specified, the default value is "standalone".
1. It specifies the address of catalog node. The format is "hostname1:catalogname1,hostname2:catalogname2,...". 2. It should specify address of at least one catalog.
1. It specifies the size of sync log file. It is between 64(MB) and 2048(MB). 2. If it is not specified, the default value is 64 (MB).
1. It specifies the amount of synchronous log file. 2. If it is not specified, the default value is 20.
1. It specifies whether transaction turns on or not. 2. If it is not specifed, the default value is false.
Timeout of waiting the transaction-lock(in second), default:60, value range:[0,3600]
The number of pre-loaders, default:0, value range:[0,100]
The maximum number of prefetchers, default:0, value range:[0,1000]
The maximum number of repl-sync threads, default:10, value range:[0, 200], 0:disable concurrent repl-sync
The number of pages ( in 64KB ) for replica log memory ( default:1024, value range:[512,1024000] ), the size should be smaller than log space
The path of temp files, default is 'dbpath'+'/tmp'
Size of the sorting buf(MB), default:256, min value:128
Size of the hash join buf(MB), default:128, min value:64
The control strategy of data sync in repl group, value enumeration: none,keepnormal,keepall, default:keepnormal.

1. It specifies the instance on which to query. 2. If it is not specifed, the default value is A. 3. value enum: M--read and write instance, S--read only instance, A--any instance, 1-7--the nth instance
1. It specifies the catalog of lob. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is "Data file path".
Open direct io in large object, if it is not specified, the default value is "false"
Extend the file as a sparse file, if it is not specified, the default value is "true"
The weight of election, default is 10, range [1, 100]
Allow client to connect with SSL (enterprise edition only), default false
Set node as an arbiter only. Default is false.
The buckets of access plan cache. Sdb will not cache any access plan if it is zero
The timeout period for heartbeat in each operation ( in ms ), default:300000, 0 for no-timeout
The overflow ratio(%) of record when inserting, default is 12, value range:[0,10000]
1. It specifies the address of om node. The format is "hostname:omservicename".
The node's max cache size, unit is MB, default is 0

1.The maximum number of cache threads, default:10, value range:[2, 200]. 2.Cache threads will synchronize the dirty pages to file, and drop the invalid pages. 3.Cache threads auto start and exit according to the cache workload.

1.The maximum number of data-sync threads, default:10, value range:[2, 200]. 2.Data-sync threads will synchronize the dirty data to file. 3.Data-sync threads auto start and exit according to the workload.
The interval times(unit:ms) of data-sync, default:10000, 0 means disable data-sync by time
The trigger condition of record number of data-sync, default:0, 0 means disable data-sync by record
1. It specifies whether deep mode turns on or not in data-sync. 2. If it is not specifed, the default value is false.
Turn on replica log archive, defalut false.
Turn on replica log archive compression, defalut true.
1. This parameter is used to specified the path of archive log file. 2. If it is not specified, the default path is "Data file path/archivelog".
The timeout period for no archive in each operation ( in seconds ), default:600, 0 for no-timeout.
The expired time for archive log file ( in hours ), default:240, 0 for no-expired.
The quota for archive log directory ( in GB ), default:10, 0 for no limit.

note.p: SequoiaDB supports setting configuration with command line,configuration file, or both of them. When both of them are used, parameters in command line will overwrite those in configuration file.
The total size of synch log (logfilesz * logfilenum)determines the fault tolerance in the process of sync. If log is bigger, the possiblity of full sync is lower.
